raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Sions ne ustizzeja
Israëtam / ka tas to buhtu lizzis
zaur winna Rohbeschahm eet/ bet
Sions tapulzeja wiffus sawus
Landis/ un tee apmettehs eekſch
Jahzu / un wiꞥſch karroja prett
Israëlu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS Israëka
Deewß nodeewe Sionn/ un wiffus
winna Landis Israëta Rohkâ/ ka
tee tehs kawe / un Israëls eeman-
toja wiffuAmorit euSemmt/ as
tai Semmê dsihwoja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee usnehte wiffu A-
moriteru Rohbeschu / no Arnoka
lihds Jabokam / un no tahs Tuk-
fnefes lihds Jardanai.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta irr nu tas KUNGS/
Israëka Deews/tohs Amoriterus
fawu Lauschu Israëta Preekscha/
no fatwahn Weetahm isdsinnis/
un tu gribbi tohs usneint ?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tew bij tohs usneint / fo
tawß DeewßKamos irr isdsinnis/
ir mehs gribbam wiffu to us-
neint / fo tas KUNGS muhfu
Deewß mubfu Preekscha tsdenn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un nu / effi tu dauds lab-
baks ne ka Balaks Zipora Dehle
to Moabiteru Rehninsch? irr tas
arridsan prett Israëtu bahrees/irr
wiꞥſch arridsan karrodams prett
winneem karrojs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ramehr Israëts dsihwojis
irr eekſch Eṣbona / un winna pee-
derrigahm Weetahm / un eekſch
Aroëra un winna peederrigahm
Weetahm/un eekſch wiſteem Pils-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es ne efimu prett te
grehkojis/ bet tu darri prett ma-
taunu prett manu karrodams/ te
KUNGS / kas Sohgis irr/
ſchodeen to Teefu ness starp Is-
eka Behrneem/un starp Ammo-
Behrneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Ammona Behrn-
Kehninsch ne klaufija Jewtu
Wahrdeem / fo wiꞥſch pee ta b
fuhttij.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nahze ta KUNG
Gars us Jewtu / un gahje za-
Gileadu un Manaffu / jo wiꞥ-
gahje zaur Mizpu eekſch Gileada-
un no Mizpas eekſch Gileada-
pahrgahje wiꞥſch pee teem An-
mona Behrneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Jewtus apfohljia-
tam KUNGAM/ un fazzija : I-
tu tohs Ammona Behrnes ma-
nâ Rohkâ dohti/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad buhs tam / kas n-
manma Naimma Durvim ma-
pretti nahks / kad es ar Meeru n-
teem Aminona Behrneem atgre-
sifchohs / tam buhs ta KUNG-
buht / jeb es uppurefbu to pa-
Dedsamu-llppuri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad gahje Jewtus pre-
teem Ammona Behrneem ar tee-
kautees/ un tas KUNGS node-
tohs winna Rohkâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch kawe tohs n-
Aroëra/ramehr nahk uhs Minit-
diwidefitts Pilsfahtus/ un lih-
to Wihna-Kalno Klgiunneem/ a-
tween
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
